body_excerpt: {"credits": [], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-40963", "cvss": {"score": 3.1, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:H/PR:L/UI:N/S:U/C:L/I:N/A:N"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 3.1, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:H/PR:L/UI:N/S:U/C:L/I:N/A:N"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-285", "name": "Improper Authorization"}], "description": "The structure_data endpoint in the Airflow UI returned external dependency graph nodes for linked Dags without checking whether the caller had read permission on those linked Dags. An authenticated UI/API user authorized for one Dag could enumerate linked Dag IDs and dependency metadata for other Dags they were not authorized to read. Affects deployments that rely on per-Dag read scoping to keep Dag dependency topology private across teams. Users are advised to upgrade to `apache-airflow` 3.2.2 or later.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00459, "percentile": 0.36595}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-gprj-xvq8-w53q", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-07-09T20:50:30Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-gprj-xvq8-w53q", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-gprj-xvq8-w53q"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-40963"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-06-01T09:16:18Z", "published_at": "2026-06-01T09:31:13Z", "references": ["https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-40963", "https://github.com/apache/airflow/pull/65342", "https://lists.apache.org/thread/s907bhsksc37m59f0loqjcp1ryobrr60", "http://www.openwall.com/lists/oss-security/2026/05/31/3", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-gprj-xvq8-w53q"], "repository_advisory_url": null, "severity": "low", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/apache/airflow", "summary": "Apache Airflow has an Improper Authorization issue", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-07-09T20:50:31Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-gprj-xvq8-w53q", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "3.2.2", "package": {"ecosystem": "pip", "name": "apache-airflow"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 3.0.0, < 3.2.2"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: Apache Airflow has an Improper Authorization issue
